---
title: "Diversity by dissemination area — Calgary"
description: "Population groups (incl. White & Indigenous) at Statistics Canada's finest standard geography, for the Calgary area (2021 Census)"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import os, json
import pandas as pd
from pipeline.charts import choropleth_groups_map, DIVERSITY_MAP_GROUPS
```

This map drops below the census tract to the **dissemination area (DA)** — Statistics Canada's *smallest* standard geography, about **400–700 people each** (several DAs make up one tract). Each little area is labelled by its StatCan ID. This page covers **Calgary**; other metros are linked from the [main Population page](diversity.qmd#diversity-by-neighbourhood).

Descriptive only: "visible minority" is Statistics Canada's term, the map now adds explicit **White** and **Indigenous** categories (White is *derived* — "Not a visible minority" minus Indigenous identity; see the [method note](diversity.qmd#diversity-by-neighbourhood)), and there is no "good"/"bad" reading. **Use the dropdown** to switch groups; zoom and pan to your street.

```{python}
#| echo: false
da_geo = "data/geo/da_calgary_2021.geojson"
da_path = "data/geo/statcan_da_calgary_ethnicity.csv"
if os.path.exists(da_geo) and os.path.exists(da_path):
    geo = json.load(open(da_geo))
    da = pd.read_csv(da_path, dtype={"dauid": str})
    groups = DIVERSITY_MAP_GROUPS
    fig = choropleth_groups_map(geo, da, "dauid", groups, name_col="name", breakdown_exclude=["all_vm"],
        pop_col="population", colorscale="Viridis", opacity=0.6, center={"lat": 51.04, "lon": -114.07}, zoom=9.3, height=720,
        source_note="Source: 2021 Census (Statistics Canada, Census Profile 98-401-X2021006); % of population by dissemination area, Calgary CMA. 'Visible minority' is StatCan's term. 'White' is derived (Not a visible minority − Indigenous identity); 'Indigenous' is Indigenous identity; with 'All visible minorities' they sum to 100%. Descriptive only.")
    fig.show(config={"displaylogo": False, "scrollZoom": True, "modeBarButtonsToRemove": ["lasso2d", "select2d"]})
else:
    print("Calgary DA diversity map not available — run build_da_profile in pipeline.build_census_geo.")
```

*Blank areas have no published data — either no residents (water, parks, industrial land) or a small but populated block whose detailed counts Statistics Canada suppresses for confidentiality. Download: [Calgary DA population-group shares (CSV)](../data/geo/statcan_da_calgary_ethnicity.csv) — 2021 Census (Statistics Canada).*

[← Back to Diversity](diversity.qmd)
